_comment: Canonical ConversationHistoryMessage wire shape. g8ee is the authority — it creates these messages and persists them in investigation conversation_history arrays. g8ed consumes them via g8ee HTTP API to render chat history and flatten audit events. A field mismatch breaks conversation history loading and operator command restoration.
_consumers: g8ed (JS — InvestigationHistoryEntry.parse() in public/js/models/investigation-models.js, AuditService.flattenInvestigationEvents in services/platform/audit_service.js)

conversation_history_message._description: Single message in an investigation's conversation_history array. Messages are appended by g8ee during chat turns, operator command executions, approval flows, and system notifications. g8ed parses these into InvestigationHistoryEntry instances for UI rendering.

id.description: Unique message identifier (UUID v4). Generated server-side by G8EE.

sender.description: Message sender path. See senders.json message.sender. g8ed derives event_type from this field via _senderToEventType mapping.

content.description: Message content. For user messages: the user's text. For AI responses: the generated response. For operator commands: command output or approval text.

timestamp.description: When the message was created. ISO 8601 string on the wire.

prev_hash.description: Hash of previous entry in the chain (hex SHA256, 64 chars). Forms the hash chain for ledger integrity.

entry_hash.description: Hash of this entry (hex SHA256, 64 chars). Computed from entry content plus prev_hash.

metadata.description: Typed metadata object. Shape varies by sender — see metadata_by_sender below. All fields are optional; g8ed reads specific fields based on metadata.sender and metadata.event_type.
metadata._note: The base ConversationMessageMetadata in g8ee carries all possible fields with extra='ignore' on deserialization. On the wire, only fields relevant to the message category are populated. g8ed should not assume any metadata field is present beyond sender.

sender.description: Echoes the top-level sender field. Always present after g8ee persistence.

event_type.description: Specific event type within the sender category. E.g. g8e.v1.operator.command.approval.requested, g8e.v1.operator.command.execution, g8e.v1.operator.command.result.

attachment_filenames.description: Filenames of attachments sent with this message

sentinel_mode.description: Sentinel mode active when message was created

has_thinking.description: Whether this message has embedded thinking content

is_thinking.description: Whether this is a thinking-only message (filtered from UI)

token_usage.description: Token usage stats from AI response

clarifying_questions.description: Batch of 3 yes/no clarifying questions from the Interrogator when intent confidence is low

execution_id.description: Operator execution ID. Groups related messages (approval + result) for the same command.

direct_execution.description: Whether this was a direct terminal execution (no approval flow)

approval_id.description: Approval request ID for system notifications about approvals

intent_name.description: Intent name for intent approval notifications
